{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219121490635B93D6B03B093680"}"},"total":421},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7547053346274525977","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真好看啊！有始有终，细节也好 ，文笔也不拉跨。很久没看过这么逻辑合理，情节流畅的穿越文了，埋的伏笔基本都填上了。没有俗套的男主，也没有下头的情爱，非常喜欢！虽是大女主文，但没有不切实际的金手指，也没有卖弄现代知识，更没有出现那种俗套的卖小吃卖肥皂卖冰情节。太合心意了！
不过小小疑问下，那个突然穿越的丫鬟有点不明白什么作用，只是为了救女主一命嘛。但是这些不是重点，总的来说很好看值得看！","text_exts":[{"e":83,"s":80,"text":"大女主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741779343B093680%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227547053346274525977%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227377008801242696728%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757191901,"group_id":"7377008801242696728","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwvHEAEcTlbtMyKuhX4so3wwyg6VdzuQJOBK4Mehw/q4","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4353698163070099","user_name":"悄无声息的俊宝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4353698163070099","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7377008801242696728","book_info":{"abstract":"要投胎了，阎王说我还要还债？
因果轮回，本该去投胎的禾芸为了还个债缘，重生到即将落魄的伯爵府的老太君身上。再一睁眼她多了几个便宜的娃。在这个多子多福的时代别人家哪个不是十几二十个娃，再看看伯爵府，第二代一个病弱，一个尚未及冠；第三代……更不用说了，妥妥一个低配版的贾宝玉。
京城人都知道段家那个老祖宗没事就往祠堂跑，祠堂的青烟燃得连陛下都瞧得见。宋盛芙一边烧着香烛纸钱，一边让段家的祖宗在下面多活动活动，毕竟未来子孙的发展你老辈子也要出份力才行，不然光吃粮不干事，那她就掀了你的饭碗！！
病弱的爸、溺爱的妈还有未来赌博的他，段伯府危矣！
这场重生之旅是偶然还是故意为之？
【架空、无CP、偏群像】
注意注意注意！重要的事情说三遍，本文架空，剧情私设，各位看客宝宝仔细辨别哦。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ed33a911bdcc6c8f1b8d57b65b43ad40","author":"狗子有猫腻","author_id":"","book_id":"7377008801242696728","book_name":"老太我寿终正寝后，被迫营业还债","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a85040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4121人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":847,"name":"养崽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=847&name=养崽&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7377233638028476952","read_count":"4121","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1005694"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"480","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,穿越,无CP,群像,养崽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d30c7672290d03219fa1a46a7bc8de4b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779361934&x-signature=7IamCK9%2Frr3USq9EhZjRo58sFfk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111278093417","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"671"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219121490635B93D6B03B093680"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读22小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":37610,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":80241,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4510},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7531401124950590233","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好的，感觉满完整的，不属于大女主文，偏群像，但是女主很有人格魅力，虽然一开始有那么两三次因为年纪太大有时候会忘事，但也挺真实的，毕竟确实是个老太太穿老太太，年纪大了有点记性不好也很正常
不是那种穿越女大秀才艺疯狂输出的类型，女主挺理智的，清楚的知道她改变不了环境就不要随意去改变人的思想，但也一直用婉转的潜移默化的方式改变着现状，她也确实做到了
主要配角大多都写的挺完整的，就是其中丁梅姝写的太无聊了，完全没有魅力，纯傻白甜哭包小娇妻
最后的结局看的有点怅然若失，感觉看完了许多人的一生，看似圆满但还是有诸多遗憾，每个人都好像走向了孤独，其实有点难受的，哎","text_exts":[{"e":74,"s":71,"text":"老太太","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%80%81%E5%A4%AA%E5%A4%AA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741779343B093680%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227531401124950590233%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227377008801242696728%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%80%81%E5%A4%AA%E5%A4%AA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753546580,"group_id":"7377008801242696728","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢快节奏，无cp党，深度厌蠢症，不喜欢无脑也不喜欢太烧脑","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3HCJd3QGDnrBUC4WMNyeZJ+JtA7EUfwK8r3uMQSf9Hz","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9ee89cb22c0e4914873d253f7cd10806~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708857&x-signature=qt1rK4w60SRj8FXaN2uPcgKVDEE%3D","user_id":"2999886233737949","user_name":"成年老妇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2999886233737949","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7377008801242696728","book_info":{"abstract":"要投胎了，阎王说我还要还债？

rwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":18265,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":61011,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4413},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7554041423665349438","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，真的特别好看，每个人都特别鲜活，不是那种女主死了就开放式大结局的结尾，有始有终，真的在这本书里看到了一个人的一生，就拿康哥儿来说吧，开头看的时候还是个小圆团子，看到结尾已经是个独当一面，家庭美满的中年男人了，看到了他的幼年，再到少年，青年，中年，每个人的结局都写出来了，这就是群像，康哥儿他们的友谊太好哭了，尤其最后一段令哥儿去世的时候，那两句诗真的看的我眼泪汪汪的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758814665,"group_id":"7377008801242696728","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxJtU6Cr2k9kEPtPI/gcmVez5K3YO3S/08vjkja+rmoJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2122488115650825","user_name":"用户名94692516"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2122488115650825","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1745796465,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7377008801242696728","book_info":{"abstract":"要投胎了，阎王说我还要还债？
